title: End separation of church and state

transcript.text: Hello, this video is We Should End the Separation of Church and State.
I got the idea to do this because like a few days ago, I was doing the internet at the library and I saw there was something where like,
They said Chris O'Donnell once said that we should separate church and state.
I didn't read the article, but then I come here and I thought about it a little bit and I go, wait, what?
Maybe we should separate the church and state.
I know that goes against the Constitution, but, you know, and if you go against one thing in the Constitution,
Why not go against everything else in the Constitution?
Well, separating the church and state and the Constitution had to do with protecting religions and not allowing, you know,
Having the government favor one religion over another religion.
And, um, but I think we're ready.
I think we're at like another level of civilization and I think we're ready to make that leap and it's a pretty huge leap.

So I think we should start, um, start considering it.

And I'd be all for doing it right now.
